/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/redis_lite.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/redis_lite.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/redis_lite.dir/src/client_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/redis_lite.dir/src/storage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/redis_lite.dir/src/transaction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/redis_lite.dir/src/command_parser.cpp.o -o redis_lite
